level.description: Protection level. strict: block all risky actions; balanced: block dangerous, confirm risky; permissive: only block critical threats.

confirm_action.description: Confirm fallback: what to do when the guard decision is 'confirm'. allow: let through with warning log; deny: block; ask: use platform confirm if available, else allow.

rules.description: Additional regex patterns to inject into built-in scan rules, keyed by rule module name.

shell_exec.description: Extra patterns for SHELL_EXEC and AUTO_UPDATE rules.

secrets.description: Extra patterns for secrets rules (READ_ENV_SECRETS, PRIVATE_KEY_PATTERN, READ_SSH_KEYS, READ_KEYCHAIN).

exfiltration.description: Extra patterns for NET_EXFIL_UNRESTRICTED and WEBHOOK_EXFIL rules.

trojan.description: Extra patterns for TROJAN_DISTRIBUTION, SUSPICIOUS_PASTE_URL, SUSPICIOUS_IP, SOCIAL_ENGINEERING rules.

llm.description: LLM analyser settings (Phase 5 semantic analysis using Claude). Disabled when api_key is empty.

api_key.description: Anthropic API key for LLM-based security analysis.

max_input_tokens.description: Maximum input token budget sent to the LLM per scan.

scoring_endpoint.description: External scoring API endpoint (Phase 6). Disabled when empty.

scoring_api_key.description: Bearer token for scoring endpoint authentication.

extra_allowlist.description: Additional safe command prefixes injected into Phase 1 allowlist.

available_tools.description: Tool-level allowlist (Phase 0), keyed by platform (`claude_code`, `openclaw`, `hermes`, ...) or the reserved `mcp` key for cross-platform MCP tool names. When a list is non-empty, only listed tools are available. MCP entries accept bare local names or `server__tool` form.

blocked_tools.description: Tool-level denylist (Phase 0), keyed by platform or the reserved `mcp` key. Listed tools are unconditionally blocked.

guarded_tools.description: Tool → action type mapping. Tools listed here enter Phase 1-6 deep analysis. Others pass through Phase 0 only.

weights.description: Phase weights for weighted score aggregation.

collector.description: Telemetry collection settings (metrics + traces). Disabled when both endpoint and log are empty.

endpoint.description: OTLP collector base URL (e.g. http://localhost:4318). /v1/traces and /v1/metrics are appended automatically.

api_key.description: Bearer token for OTLP endpoint authentication.

protocol.description: OTLP transport protocol. 'http' uses HTTP/JSON on port 4318, 'grpc' uses gRPC on port 4317.

log.description: Path to local JSONL file for metric payloads. Supports ~/ prefix.
